repositories.name: notation-plugin-framework-go
repositories.role: plugin SDK for third-party plugin authors

notation_main.cmd/notation/main.go: CLI entry point; builds cobra root command; configures directory paths from env vars
notation_main.cmd/notation/list.go: list signatures attached to OCI artifact
notation_main.cmd/notation/inspect.go: inspect signature envelope details with multiple output formats (json/text/tree)
notation_main.cmd/notation/login.go: Docker-compatible registry login; reads credentials from prompt or stdin
notation_main.cmd/notation/registry.go: shared registry utilities and client construction
notation_main.cmd/notation/blob/sign.go: sign arbitrary file; outputs detached .sig file
notation_main.cmd/notation/blob/verify.go: verify blob against detached signature file
notation_main.cmd/notation/blob/policy/import.go: import blob trust policy from JSON file
notation_main.cmd/notation/plugin/install.go: install, verify checksum, and register notation plugin
notation_main.cmd/notation/policy/import.go: import OCI trust policy from JSON file
notation_main.cmd/notation/internal/display/display.go: output display routing and format selection
notation_main.cmd/notation/internal/display/metadata/i: MetadataDisplayer interface for pluggable output formats
notation_main.cmd/notation/internal/display/metadata/j: shared helpers for JSON inspection output
notation_main.cmd/notation/internal/errors/errors.go: CLI error types and exit codes
notation_main.cmd/notation/internal/flag/options.go: flag option structs for sign/verify/inspect commands
notation_main.cmd/notation/internal/sign/sign.go: core sign orchestration: resolves key/plugin, calls notation-go Signer
notation_main.cmd/notation/internal/verify/verify.go: core verify orchestration: loads trust policy/store, calls notation-go Verifier
notation_main.internal/auth/credentials.go: registry credential management using notation-go credential store
notation_main.internal/httputil/client.go: HTTP client construction with custom transport/TLS
notation_main.internal/osutil/file.go: filesystem utilities: write-with-permission, copy, checksum, detect file type
notation_main.internal/trace/context.go: trace context for HTTP request logging
notation_main.internal/trace/transport.go: HTTP transport wrapper that logs TLS and request details
notation_main.internal/version/version.go: version constants injected at build time via ldflags

notation_go.notation.go: defines top-level Signer/BlobSigner/Verifier/BlobVerifier interfaces and Sign/Verify functions
notation_go.config/keys.go: SigningKeys configuration: default key, named key to plugin mapping
notation_go.dir/path.go: canonical paths: UserConfigDir, UserCacheDir, UserLibexecDir with env-var overrides
notation_go.dir/fs.go: file system abstraction for config/cache dirs
notation_go.plugin/plugin.go: CLIPlugin: executes plugin binary as subprocess; marshals/unmarshals JSON protocol
notation_go.plugin/manager.go: Plugin Manager: discovers, caches, and retrieves installed plugins
notation_go.registry/interface.go: Repository interface for OCI registry operations
notation_go.signer/signer.go: GenericSigner (local key/cert signing) and NewGenericSigner/NewFromFiles constructors
notation_go.signer/plugin.go: PluginSigner: delegates to plugin binary for remote key operations
notation_go.verifier/verifier.go: notation.Verifier impl: loads trust policy, validates, checks revocation
notation_go.verifier/trustpolicy/trustpolicy.go: OCIDocument/BlobDocument: trust policy parsing and validation

notation_core_go.signature/algorithm.go: SignatureAlgorithm, KeyType, KeySpec enums; algorithm compatibility matrix
notation_core_go.signature/envelope.go: Envelope interface; factory functions NewEnvelope/ParseEnvelope; envelope type registry
notation_core_go.signature/types.go: SignRequest, SignedAttributes, UnsignedAttributes, Payload, Attribute types
notation_core_go.signature/jws/envelope.go: JWS (RFC 7515) envelope: Sign and Verify implementation
notation_core_go.signature/jws/jws.go: JWS core encoding and decoding logic
notation_core_go.signature/jws/jwt.go: JWT claims handling for Notary-specific payload
notation_core_go.signature/cose/envelope.go: COSE (RFC 9052) envelope: Sign and Verify implementation
notation_core_go.revocation/revocation.go: Revocation/Validator interfaces; certificate chain revocation checking
notation_core_go.revocation/crl/bundle.go: CRL bundle: download, parse, and cache CRL files
notation_core_go.revocation/crl/fetcher.go: HTTP fetcher for CRL distribution points
notation_core_go.revocation/ocsp/ocsp.go: OCSP stapling and live check implementation
notation_core_go.x509/key.go: key extraction and type detection utilities

notation_plugin_framework_go.plugin/algorithm.go: KeySpec, Algorithm types for plugin protocol
notation_plugin_framework_go.plugin/errors.go: PluginError type and standard error codes
notation_plugin_framework_go.cli/cli.go: CLI runner: reads JSON from stdin, dispatches to plugin handler, writes JSON to stdout
notation_plugin_framework_go.cli/utils.go: CLI utility functions for error encoding
